title: Thig Brothers
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Brothers}}
The '''Thig Brothers''' were two well-known [[spice-jacker]]s operating out of the [[Stenness Node|Stenness System]].

==Biography==
They robbed an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military supply depot and made off with a cache of [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifles]]. Two [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] named [[Jodo Kast]] and [[Zardra]] accepted a job to bring the Thig Brothers down.

They tracked them down to a grimy, [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]-controlled [[Planet/Legends|planet]] known as [[Taboon]]. Recognizing how dangerous the Thigs were, Jodo suggested that they split up and try to corral the brothers into a dimly lit bistro known as the [[Red Shadow]]. The plan worked, and they succeeded in hemming the sibling [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] into a crossfire. As luck would have it though, a Hutt named [[Mageye]] had been passing through the district and inadvertently disrupted the fire-fight. During the schism, Mageye fell from his [[Palanquin/Legends|palanquin]] and rolled on top of Zardra. She was forced to destroy Mageye by shoving a gauge six [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] into his mouth. In the midst of battle, the Thig Brothers managed to get away.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} {{1stm}}
